name: Janet Frame
bio: Janet Paterson Frame was a New Zealand author. She is internationally renowned for her work, which includes novels, short stories, poetry, juvenile fiction, and an autobiography, and received numerous awards including being appointed to the Order of New Zealand, New Zealand's highest civil honour.

awards.name: Commander of the Order of the British Empire
honorary doctor of the University of Waikato
honorary doctor of the University of Otago
Prime Minister's Award for Literary Achievement (Fiction)
